# MDE v1.4.1

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed Mermaid flowchart rendering so static complete-thumbnail previews stay below each edited Mermaid source block instead of overlapping the document.
- Removed the duplicated Mermaid source editor from the preview panel; the original fenced code block remains the single editable source.
- Added an enlarged Mermaid preview dialog with icon controls for zooming, reset view, centered/full-page modes, draggable panning, trackpad-friendly scrolling, and selectable flowchart text.
- Restored visible code-block language selectors above highlighted code blocks.
- Normalized common fenced-code language aliases such as `ts`, `js`, `sh`, and `txt` so imported Markdown selects a visible supported language.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit, integration, and E2E regression coverage for Mermaid preview placement, static editor thumbnails, enlarged preview interactions, code language selector visibility, and code language alias normalization.
- Isolated CLI registration tests from machine-level `/usr/local/bin/mde` installs while keeping the production default command-directory scan.

## Documentation and User Manual

- Updated the zh-CN editor manual with code-block language selector behavior and Mermaid source/preview placement plus enlarged preview controls.
- Refreshed zh-CN user manual screenshots after the editor rendering fix.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run docs:screenshots`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npm run build`
- `npm audit --audit-level=high`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions should publish the macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS installer artifacts for `v1.4.1`.
- Repository signing/notarization secrets could not be inspected locally because the current GitHub token does not have Actions secrets read permission; release signing behavior will follow the repository's configured secrets.
